Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "DROPZONE-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Dropzone.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
This game has an issue on some real C64s whereby the fire button in port 2 is constantly in autofire mode without the button actually being pressed. Therefore, the following fix has been applied:
1. Changed the LDA #$0F instruction at $9B26 to be LDA #$7F instead 2. Changed the LDA #$10 instruction at $9B33 to be LDA #$7F instead
The loading screen by Steve Day (STE'86) was obtained from CSDb.
